backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining Product and CartItem types with hardcoded natural food color products (red, yellow, blue), and public functions for product retrieval, cart management (add, view, total), stored per Principal.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping four main features (homepage, product catalog, shopping cart, checkout flow, visual theme) to their implementing files, components, and test IDs with high confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON object containing one-sentence summaries of all frontend files including components, pages, hooks, and configuration files for the Whisk and Bloom natural food color e-commerce application.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining OKLCH color system for light and dark modes, including warm earth tones and natural aesthetic color palette.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with root div and module script loading main.tsx, titled 'Whisk and Bloom'.
frontend/src/App.tsx: TanStack Router configuration defining all application routes (home, products, product detail, cart, checkout, order confirmation) with Layout wrapper and RouterProvider.
frontend/src/components/BrandStory.tsx: Brand story section component displaying mission statement and three value propositions (100% Natural, Artisan Quality, Vibrant Results) with icons in a responsive grid.
frontend/src/components/CartIcon.tsx: Shopping cart button with badge showing total item count from useCart hook, navigates to cart page on click.
frontend/src/components/CartItem.tsx: Cart item component displaying product image, name, description, quantity selector, subtotal calculation, and remove button with callbacks for quantity updates and removal.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Hero section with background image, gradient overlay, headline, description, badge, and two CTA buttons (Explore Products, Learn More) with navigation.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout component with sticky header containing logo, navigation links (Home, Products), cart icon, and footer with company info and quick links.
frontend/src/components/OrderSummary.tsx: Displays order summary with cart items, quantities, individual prices, and total price with loading skeletons.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Product card component displaying product image, name, description, and price with click navigation to product detail page.
frontend/src/components/ProductHighlight: Section component that displays the first 4 products in a grid layout with loading skeletons and heading.
frontend/src/components/QuantitySelector: Reusable quantity input component with increment/decrement buttons and configurable min/max values.
frontend/src/components/ShippingForm.tsx: Form component for collecting shipping information (name, address, city, postal code, country) with submit handler.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Hook that manages ICP actor creation with Internet Identity authentication, invalidating dependent queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCart.ts: Hooks for cart operations: viewing cart items, calculating total, and adding items to cart with query invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validation.
frontend/src/hooks/useProduct.ts: Hook to fetch a single product by ID using the ICP actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useProducts.ts: Hook to fetch all products from the backend using the ICP actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Minimal file noting that queries are organized in feature-specific hooks rather than centralized here.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom color scheme using warm earth tones (terracotta, sage, amber) for light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClient for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication, rendering the main App component.
frontend/src/pages/CartPage.tsx: Shopping cart page displaying cart items with quantity update functionality, order summary, and checkout button; shows empty state when cart has no items.
frontend/src/pages/CheckoutPage.tsx: Checkout page with shipping form and order summary; redirects to order confirmation after submission and shows empty state if cart is empty.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Homepage component that renders Hero, ProductHighlights, and BrandStory sections to showcase the Whisk and Bloom brand.
frontend/src/pages/OrderConfirmation.tsx: Order confirmation page displaying success message with next steps and navigation buttons to continue shopping or return home.
frontend/src/pages/ProductCatalog.tsx: Product catalog page displaying all natural food colour products in a responsive grid with loading skeletons and introductory text.
frontend/src/pages/ProductDetailPage.tsx: Product detail page showing full product information, images, quantity selector, add-to-cart functionality, and detailed descriptions with ingredients and uses; includes breadcrumb navigation.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color scheme using OKLCH, typography with custom font families (Inter, Playfair Display, Cormorant Garamond), animations, and design tokens for the brand aesthetic.
project_state.json: Project state file documenting Whisk and Bloom e-commerce site features including homepage, product catalog, shopping cart, checkout flow, product detail pages, and required product/brand images.
